nodes.name: Watch QUEUE
nodes.notes: Fires when a new .json file lands in QUEUE/. Update path if VAULT_PATH changes.

nodes.name: Read Task
nodes.notes: Reads task JSON, determines route (OLLAMA / RESEARCH / HANDOFF). Returns [] for non-PENDING tasks — stops execution cleanly.

nodes.name: Route?
nodes.notes: true (output 0) → Ollama path. false (output 1) → Non-Ollama Handler (RESEARCH=DEFERRED, BLUEPRINT/CODE=HANDOFF).

nodes.name: Call Ollama
nodes.notes: POSTs to Ollama. Requires OLLAMA_URL and OLLAMA_MODEL env vars (set by n8n_env.ps1). Timeout 5 min for large prompts.

nodes.name: Write + Log
nodes.notes: HIGH CONFIDENCE → writes OUTPUTS/[task_id]_RESULT.md. LOW → writes HANDOFFS/[task_id]_HANDOFF.json. Always updates task JSON status and appends DECISION_LOG table row.

nodes.name: Non-Ollama Handler
nodes.notes: RESEARCH → marks DEFERRED (Workflow 3 not built yet). BLUEPRINT/CODE → writes HANDOFF JSON for Claude. Both paths update task status and log to DECISION_LOG.

_sfv_notes: Import: n8n Settings → Workflows → Import from file
Pre-requisites: run n8n_env.ps1 first — sets OLLAMA_URL, OLLAMA_MODEL, VAULT_PATH, NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_BUILTIN=fs,path
HTTP Request body: if 'specifyBody: json' fails on your n8n version, open Call Ollama node and switch Body to 'Raw/JSON', paste: {"model":"qwen3:14b","prompt":"{{$json.prompt}}","stream":false}
Confidence routing: HIGH → OUTPUTS/[task_id]_RESULT.md | LOW → HANDOFFS/[task_id]_HANDOFF.json
RESEARCH tasks: marked DEFERRED until Workflow 3 (Tavily) is built
This workflow mirrors the routing logic in 99_INBOX/ollama_queue_test.py — both must stay in sync
